summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bolt.new clone AI App Builder. Tested authentication, project management, TopBar functionality, dashboard, and AI integration. Found 2 critical issues with TopBar project name display and project loading, plus 1 minor UI issue with missing data-testid attributes.

ui_bugs.issue: TopBar shows 'New Project' instead of actual project name when loading existing project from dashboard
ui_bugs.impact: User cannot see which project they're working on

ui_bugs.issue: Chat history and project files not loading when clicking project from dashboard
ui_bugs.impact: Users lose context when switching between projects

integration_issues.issue: Project data (name, messages, files) not properly restored in IDE when navigating from dashboard

design_issues.issue: Missing data-testid attributes on project cards for automated testing

passed_tests: TopBar dropdown menu functionality (New Project, Dashboard, All Projects)
New Project button clears URL and resets state
Project modification maintains same project_id (no new project creation)
View toggles (Preview, Code, Split) work correctly
Chat interface is functional and accepts input
AI code generation API works (tested with 60s timeout)
Project creation from IDE creates proper project_id in URL
Dashboard navigation from TopBar dropdown works
All backend APIs return correct status codes
User projects API returns proper project list
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix TopBar project name display issue in IDE.jsx loadProject function - ensure setProjectName is called with actual project name. Fix project data loading when navigating from dashboard - ensure messages and files are properly restored in IDE state.

success_percentage.backend: 95% - All APIs working, AI generation successful with proper timeouts
success_percentage.frontend: 75% - Core functionality works but project loading has issues
